title: CloudFormation parsing failure
description: CloudFormation parsing failureAnalyze your codeCode SmellsuspiciousWhy is this an issue?When the CloudFormation parser fails, it is possible to record the failure as a violation on the file. This way, not only it is possible to track the number of files that do not parse but also to easily find out why they do not parse.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIAvailable Since9.2Analyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.2©2025SonarSource Sàrl.
